name: DebridHub
description: Replaces the *arr stack: direct streaming via self-refreshing .strm files, batch downloads, Torznab search, a watchlist, a Seerr/Jellyseerr request webhook, and a library organizer.
overview: Stream and batch-download from Real-Debrid / AllDebrid inside Jellyfin.

versions.changelog: ID-based matching for non-English content. With a TMDb API key set, Seerr requests resolve to TVDb/IMDb ids and DebridHub searches the indexer by id and matches on season/episode - so foreign-titled releases (Shingeki no Kyojin for Attack on Titan) are found and wrong shows are not grabbed. Falls back to title-text matching when no TMDb key or id is available.
